calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Request For Default Court Judgment; Motion For Default Court Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Kristin Kerr, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CLAUDIA KO.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) JIMMY ZHI QIANG RONG.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Plaintiff Claudia Ko sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $74,707.81
Punitive Damages $53,000.00
Costs: $1,179.71 for court filing fee and process service fees; together with interest at the rate of ten (10%) commencing on the date of judgment until paid in full.
Total Judgment in the amount of $128,887.52
Judgment signed in open court.
